text:
ion, sturdy figure, a temperament
principally of heat and dryness. Mercury makes the stature
proportionately well shaped, bodily temperament chiefly
hot and yellowish complexion. Jupiter gives a fair
complexion, large eyes and dignified stature. Venus
produces qualities of a nature more applicable to feminity,
beauty, softness and greater delicacy of form. Saturn, black
and curled hair, tall figure, inactive and narrow chest.
The mental disposition should always be judged by
reference to the Moon and his disposition. The dispositions
given below are of a general nature. In actual practice,
however, they will be seen to vary from the normal in some
respects, owing to the strength of the ruling sign, its ruler,
planets aspecting the ascendant, etc.
The liability to diseases and accidents is judged from
